sentences.english: If you watched Lassie as a child, you might also remember Flipper the Dolphin and Skippy the Kangaroo.
sentences.korean: 어린 시절 래시를 봤다면 돌고래 플리퍼와 캥거루 스키피도 기억할 거예요.

sentences.english: The stars of these shows were animals who would come to the rescue of humans in trouble.
sentences.korean: 이 쇼의 주인공은 곤경에 처한 인간을 구하러 오는 동물이었어요.

sentences.english: It might sound strange, but we'll be hearing how cows are helping to stop fires in Spain!
sentences.korean: 이상하게 들릴 수 있지만, 스페인에서 소가 화재를 막는 데 어떻게 돕는지 들어볼 거예요!

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Can Climate Change Affect Mental Health?
